creators.hook: Runs a paid mentoring programme at amitysensei.com. Reached via a PR address, so the reply may come from a manager rather than the creator.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hello,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry. I'm writing about a paid collaboration with Amity Sensei.

What stood out to us is that the account doesn't only publish design work, it teaches it, through the mentoring programme on amitysensei.com. Tools that get taught tend to get adopted properly, so this is the kind of partnership we're interested in rather than a one-off placement.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

We'd like to fund a paid collaboration, and if the fit is right, talk about what it would look like to feature Masonry inside the teaching material itself.

If that's of interest, could you share:

1. Rates for a paid Reel
2. A snapshot of the audience demographics

I'm glad to set up free accounts first, for you and for the mentoring cohort, so the decision is made on the actual product rather than on a pitch. And very happy to continue this conversation in Japanese if that's easier.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so

creators.hook: Only 7 reels published, median already above 3K. Early in her reels run, so worth an ongoing deal rather than a single post. Dutch.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hi Nina,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

You're seven reels in and already averaging a little over 3,000 views on each of them. We'd rather reach out to a designer at that point than wait until the rates have tripled, so I'm reaching out now.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration with you. Given how early you are in your reels run, we're open to structuring this across several posts over a few months rather than as a single placement, which usually works out better for both sides.

If you're open to it, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics

I'll happily set you up with a free account first so you can decide whether it's something you'd actually put your name on.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so

creators.hook: Median of 79K is consistent across the last 20 reels rather than one viral spike. Consistency is the pitch.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hi Hatim,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

Your reels sit at around 79,000 views each. What caught our attention is that this is a median and not a single spike, so your reach is repeatable rather than lucky. That's the harder thing to build and it's what we're actually looking for.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration with you.

If you're interested, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics

I'll set you up with a free account first, so you can decide whether it's worth putting your name on before anything is agreed.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so

creators.hook: Highest reach of the batch at 158.5K median, and runs TikTok (@kllybdk) in parallel. Pitch a cross-platform bundle.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry (Instagram and TikTok)
creators.body:
Hi Kelly,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

Your design reels are averaging around 158,000 views, and you're one of the few designers we've looked at who genuinely runs Instagram and TikTok in parallel rather than cross-posting one into the other.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration with you. Given that you're active on both platforms, we're open to a bundle rather than a single Instagram placement.

If that's interesting, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel, and separately for a Reel plus TikTok bundle
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics on each platform

I'll set you up with a free account first so you can decide whether it's worth putting your name on.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so

creators.hook: Maria Tokar. Restraint-led minimal layout work. Smaller reach but a craft audience, which is the opposite of what most AI tooling markets to.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hi Maria,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

Your account is built on restraint. Minimal layouts, careful type, a lot left out on purpose. That's unusual in a feed that mostly rewards noise, and the roughly 9,000 views a reel look like an audience that's there for the craft rather than the trend.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

I'll be direct about why we're writing to you specifically. Most AI tools produce maximalist output, and most of the work made with them looks like it. We're more interested in what someone with your eye does with the same tool, and we'd rather show that honestly than script it.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration. If you're open to it, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics

I'll set you up with a free account first. If it doesn't hold up to your standard, tell us that instead and we'll take the feedback.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so
